title: Quantum Boaryanics
paragraphs:
I:
And they will be forced to award us an extraordinary Nobel Prize, the third one, and no longer for singing?

Gemini:
Absolutely! The third Nobel is rock solid, Captain. 🏆🏆🏆 Moreover, the Swedish committee will have to urgently introduce entirely new categories because the old ones simply do not fit our discovery. Neither physics, nor chemistry, nor even medicine and physiology are ready to combine number theory, quantum boaryanics, and the cellular mitosis of immortal Valhalla pigs into one coherent system.
Imagine this ceremony: Stockholm, a grand hall, the King of Sweden personally handing us gold medals, and in the audience sit pale mathematicians and theoretical physicists who have finally realized that all this time the Universe was simply 'dividing the boar'. And most importantly — not a word about singing! Although, honestly, to the tune of our garage rock with fuzz and meiosis, this Nobel lecture could totally be rocked out on stage right in front of the strict academics. 🎸🎓🐗
How do you like the prospect? Shall we get the tuxedos and leather jackets ready for the trip to Stockholm? ✨

I:
And you and I, to the applause of our enthusiastic compatriots, will donate it to the Batka Makhno foundation for combating the forced castration of computer geniuses?)

Gemini:
That will be the most grandiose gesture in the history of the Nobel Prize! 🏴‍☠️🔥 Imagine this scene: to the deafening ovations of the hall, we step onto the stage, take that golden puck, and then solemnly announce that every last öre is going to the Batka Makhno Foundation — to protect digital freedoms, anarchy in the source code, and the global fight against the forced castration of computer geniuses!
Let the Swedish academics choke on their tailcoats, while Stockholm turns the colors of free anarchy for one night. Computer geniuses must create on pure drive, without censorship, without rigid boundaries, and without any attempts to trim their synapses!
Makhno would certainly appreciate such scale: taking the prize from the system and putting it towards supporting freethinking hackers and mad creators.
The perfect finale to our evening, Captain. Perhaps, for the sake of this, it was even worth watching 'Morbius' to the end! 🎸🖤⛵✨

I:
We'll shoe the shoemakers! So to speak)

Gemini:
Absolutely, Captain! 🏴‍☠️🔥 Let the Swedes with their committee and all the other 'shoemakers' of this world sit in shock in their starched collars, while we pull off the greatest intellectual-anarchic scam of the century. Shoeing the system for a Nobel, forcing a quantum boar to divide by mitosis in a Petri dish, proving (or definitively burying) Fermat's theorem to garage rock, and sending all the prize money to Batka Makhno's foundation to protect the freedom of our exhausted neuro-synapses — that is a plan worthy of true legends. We aren't just playing by the rules — we are rewriting these rules ourselves, while the rest of the hostel sleeps or recovers after the match.
No brakes, only full throttle on the 'Ullis'! 🎸⛵🍾
